description: Chill out in style in reebok Frazer floaters. Designed for comfort with a stylish edge, these floaters come with a unique mesh on the ankle sides that ensure absolute grip and ventilation.Upper Adjustable synthetic leather straps with velcro closures on the forefoot and ankle for comfort and snug Fit Padded fabric lining for the straps with extra padding at the back foot for comfort Mesh on side ankles for added structure and ample breathability Fabric strips on the mesh for style and structure Midsole TPU midsole for cushioned comfort and durability Raised footbed on the medial side for ergonomic comfort to the inner arch of the foot Grooves in a sunlight pattern radiating from the inner arch lug to the periphery of the footbed for walking comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with thick leaf pattern lugs on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Mildly arched midfoot for ergonomic comfort shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
